calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Set Aside/Void Default And Default And Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Miyuki Yoshioka's, dba Sushi-Man, motion to set aside the Default entered August 3, 2009 & the Default Judgment entered August 9, 2009.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

No appearance by plaintiff IMP Foods.
Christine Hiler, Esq. appeared for defendant Miyuki Yoshioka, dba Sushi-Man.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, defendant Miyuki Yoshioka's, dba Sushi-Man, motion is GRANTED, and the Default entered August 3, 2009 & Default Judgment entered August 9, 2009 are hereby set aside.

It is further Ordered that if plaintiff wishes to pursue this action it must properly serve defendant.

Order granting defendant Miyuki Yoshioka's motion to set aside the default and default judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Off Calendar
